्यह पाठ् ्य पुस्तक नवद् ्य ान्मि्यों के पूवमि ज् ाि को दृष्ष् में रख्ते हुए भाषा के िवीि एवं व्यावहाररक 
प्र्योगों ्त्ा नवनवध मिोरंजक नवष्यों के सा् आपके सममुख प्रस्तु्त है । पाठ् ्य पुस्तक को स्तरी्य 
(ग्ेडेड) बिािे हे्तु दो भागों में नवभानज्त कर ्ते हुए उसका ‘सरल से कनठि की ओर’ क्रम रखा ग्या है । 
्यहाँ नवद् ्य ान्मि्यों के पूवमि अ िुभव, घर-पररवार, पररसर को आधार बिाकर श्रवण, भाषण-संभाषण, 
वाचि, लेखि के भाषाई मूल कौशलों के सा् भाषा अध्य्यि और अध्य्यि कौशल पर नवशेष बल 
नद्या ग ्या है । इसमें सव्यं अध्य्यि एवं चचामि को प्रेरर्त कर िे वाली रंजक, आकषमिक, सहज और सरल 
भाषा का प्र्योग नक्या ग्या है ।
पाठ् ्यपुस्तक में आए शबदों और वाक्यों की रचिा नहंदी की व्यावहाररक्ता को ध्याि में रखकर की 
गई है । इसमें क्रनमक एवं श्रेणीबद्ध कौशलानधष्ठि्त अध्य्यि सामग्ी, अध्यापि संके्त, अभ्यास और उपक्रम भी नदए गए हैं । नवद् ्य ान्मि्यों के नलए ल ्यातमक क नव्ता, बालगी्त, कहािी, संवाद, पत्र आनद 
नवष्यों का समावेश हैं । सव्यं की अनभव्यष्ति, कलपिाशील्ता के सा्-सा् वै नवध्यपूणमि स वाध्या्य के 
रूप में ‘जरा सोचो...., ‘खोजबीि’, ‘मैंिे क्या समझा’, ‘अध्य्यि कौशल’ आनद का्यामितमक कृन्त्यॉं भी दी गई हैं । सृजिशील गन्तनवनध्यों को बढ़ावा देिे वाले अभ्यास ‘मेरी कलम से’ ‘वाचि जग ्त से’, 
‘ब्ताओ ्तो सही’, ‘सुिो ्तो जरा’, ‘सव्यं अध्य्यि’ ्त्ा ‘ नवचार मं्ि’ आ नद का समावेश नक्या ग ्या 
है । इि कृन्त्यों में एक दृष्ष्कोण रखिे का प्र्यास नक्या है नजसे समझकर नवद् ्य ान्मि्यों ्तक पहँुचािा 
और उिसे करवािा है ।
दशक्कचों एवं अदभभतावकचों से यि अपेक्ता िरै दक अधययन-अनुभव िेने से पिले पताठ् यपुस्क में 
दिए गए अधयतापन संके् एवं दिशता दनिदेशचों को अचछी ्रि समझ लें । सभी कृन्त्यों का नवद् ्य ान्मि्यों 
से अभ्यास करवाऍं । सवाध्या्य में नदए गए निददेशों के अिुसार पाठ् ्य सामग्ी उपलबध करा्ते हुए उनच्त 
मागमिदशमिि करें ्त्ा आवश्यक गन्तनवनध्याँ सव्य ं करवाऍं । व्याकरण (भाषा अध्य्यि) को समझिे हे्तु 
‘भाषा 
की ओर’के अं्तगमि्त नचत्रों ्त्ा भाषाई खेलों को नद्या ग ्या है ्तानक पु िराव्तमिि और िए व ्याकरण 
का ज्ाि हो । पारंपररक पद् धन्त से व्याकरण पढ़ािा अपेनषि्त िहीं है ।  
आवश्यक्तािुसार पाठ् ्य े्तर कृन्त्यों, खेलों, संदभभों, प्रसंगों का समावेश करें । नशषिक एवं 
अनभभावक पाठ् ्य पुस्तक के माध्यम से जीवि मूल्यों, जीवि कौशलों, मूलभू्त ्तत्वों के नवकास का 
अवसर नवद् ्य ान्मि्यों को प्रदाि करें । पाठ् ्य सामग्ी का मूल्यांकि निरं्तर होिे वाली प्रनक्र्या है इससे 
नवद् ्या्थी परीषिा के ्तिाव से मुति रहेंगे । पाठ् ्य पुस्तक में अं्तनिमिनह्त सभी  षिम्ताओं-श्रवण, भाषण-
संभाषण, वाचि, लेखि, भाषा अध्य्यि (व्याकरण) और अध्य्यि कौशल का स्त्त मूल्यांकि अपेनषि्त है ।
नवशवास है नक आप सब अध्य्यि-अध्यापि में पाठ् ्य पुस्तक का उप्योग कुशल्तापूवमिक करेंगे 
और नहंदी नवष्य के प्रन्त नवद् ्य ान्मि्यों में अनभरुनच और आतमी्य्ता की भाविा जागृ्त कर्ते हुए उिके 
सवाांगीण नवकास में सह्योग देंगे ।

7.4  Compound Interest
You might have come across statements like “one year interest for FD (fixed deposit) in
the bank @ 9% per annum” or ‘Savings account with interest @ 5% per annum’.
Interest  is the extra money paid by institutions like banks or post offices on money
deposited (kept) with them. Interest is also paid by people when they borrow money .
We already know how to calculate Simple Inter est.
Example 7: A sum of ` 10,000 is borrowed at a rate of interest 15% per annum for 2
years. Find the simple interest on this sum and the amount to be paid at the end of 2 years.
Solution:  On `  100, interest charged for 1 year is ` 15.
So, on `  10,000, interest charged  = 1510000100× = ` 1500
Interest for 2 years = ` 1500 × 2 = ` 3000
Amount to be paid at the end of 2 years = Principal + Interest
=` 10000 + `  3000 = ` 13000

ABSTRACT 
AI based question bank prediction system based on Ncert curriculum is a web-
based AI-enabled educational platform designed to help students practice class-
wise and chapter-wise questions based class-wise, subject-wise, and chapter-wise 
categorization. The platform provides instant evaluation of student responses and 
displays detailed performance analytics including correct/wrong count, score, and 
chapter mastery percentage. 
The system is optimized for use on tablets through an “Add to Home Screen” 
feature, allowing students to use the platform as a clean, distraction-free app 
without installation. The backend integrates AI-based question generation, auto-
evaluation logic, and progress tracking, while the frontend is built using HTML, 
CSS, and JavaScript. 
Node.js is used for server-side processing, and Firebase/MySQL is used for data 
storage. AI Study Point aims to enhance self-learning, strengthen exam 
preparation, and make NCERT practice more interactive, personalized, and 
accessible. The platform ultimately supports students with smart AI-generated 
questions, real-time feedback, and consistent learning progress. 
 
1. INTRODUCTION  
AI based question bank prediction system based on Ncert curriculum  is a web-
based AI-powered learning platform designed specifically to address these 
challenges. The platform provides class-wise, subject-wise, and chapter-wise 
question practice for NCERT Classes 6 to 8. Unlike static question banks, AI 
based question bank prediction system based on Ncert curriculum  uses artificial 
intelligence to automatically read NCERT chapters and generate multiple 
question types including MCQs, True/False, and short-answer questions. 
This ensures that learners always receive updated, chapter-relevant, and concept-
focused practice. Digital learning is becoming essential for students in India, 
especially those using NCERT textbooks. Students often struggle to find 
structured, chapter-wise questions with instant explanations. The system focuses 
on NCERT textbooks. The platform uses artificial intelligence to automatically 
generate MCQ, True/False, and short-answer questions from NCERT chapters 
and evaluates students’ answers instantly. students can practice these questions 
through a structured interface that includes  4 
 on simplicity and accessibility, especially for Class 6–8 students who use tablets 
in schools. Through the “Add to Home Screen” feature, the website works like a 
mobile/tablet app without installation.  
     1.1 Motivation and Significance 
A major motivation behind AI based question bank prediction system based on 
Ncert curriculum  is to remove these learning barriers and provide students with 
a reliable, intelligent, and easy-to-use practice system. Many students struggle to 
find chapter-specific questions, practice regularly, and understand their weak 
areas. Teachers also require platforms that can assist with revision, homework, 
and concept reinforcement.The significance of this project lies in its ability to 
transform NCERT-based learning into a personalized and interactive experience. 
Its tablet-friendly design makes it ideal for modern school environments, where 
digital devices are increasingly used for education. By providing quick access, 
clean UI, and AI-powered evaluation, AI based question bank prediction system 
based on Ncert curriculum enhances learning efficiency and supports both home-
based study and classroom learning. Students need Organized question practice, 
Instant evaluation,  Progressive difficulty levels, Chapter mastery indicators,  AI 
based question bank prediction system based on Ncert curriculum  directly 
fulfills these needs with AI-powered question generation and instant performance 
analytics.  
 
2. PROBLEM STATEMENT AND OBJECTIVES 
Students who rely on NCERT textbooks often face multiple challenges while 
preparing for exams, especially when it comes to chapter-wise practice and self-
assessment. Most available learning platforms provide either unstructured 
question banks, paid content, or lack AI-driven evaluation. Students find it 
difficult to: 
2.1 Core Problem 
Students need a centralized AI-powered system for structured chapter practice. 
 Unstructured or outdated questions 
 No AI-driven instant evaluation 
 Lack of chapter-wise progression 
 No unified free platform for Class 6–8 
 No device-friendly interface for school tablets 
2.2  Project Objectives  5 
 These objectives collectively aim to create an intelligent, user-friendly       
platform that enhances NCERT learning through AI-driven automation and 
personalized practice. 
The main objectives of the AI Study Point project are: 
 To design a web-based NCERT practice system named AI based question bank 
prediction system based on Ncert curriculum.  To enable class-wise, subject-
wise, and chapter-wise navigation. To design a clean, simple, and tablet-
optimized interface that works like an app through the “Add to Home Screen” 
feature. 
 To develop AI-generated questions (MCQ, True/False, Short Answer). To 
develop an admin interface for managing questions, student data, and system 
content when required.  that makes naviga Ɵon easy for Class 6 –8 students and 
supports eﬀec Ɵve self-learning. 
 To implement automated evaluation of student responses. To integrate an AI-
powered question generation system.  that extracts content from NCERT 
chapters and automa Ɵcally creates MCQs, True/False, and short -answer 
quesƟons. 
 To create a tablet-friendly, distraction-free UI. 
 
3. SCOPE AND METHODOLOGY 
The scope of AI based question bank prediction system based on Ncert 
curriculum encompasses the development of an AI-powered, web-based learning 
platform designed to support NCERT-based practice for students of Classes 6 to 
8. The project focuses on creating a structured and intelligent environment where 
students can learn, practice, and assess their chapter-wise understanding through 
automatically generated questions and real-time evaluation. 
 3.1 Inclusions 
 Class -wise and Subject-wise Navigation:-The system provides  structured 
access to NCERT content for Classes 6, 7, and 8 across key subjects such as 
Mathematics, Science, Social Science, English, and Hindi. 
 AI-Based Question Generation:- The project includes the integration of 
AI/NLP techniques to read NCERT chapters and automatically generate 
various question types: Multiple Choice Questions (MCQs), True/False, 
Short-answer questions, Difficulty-based questions (Easy, Medium, Hard) 
 Chapter-WisePractice and Quiz Interface:-Students can start quizzes for any 
selected chapter and practice questions interactively. 6 
  Instant Evaluation and Analytics:-The system provides real-time scoring, 
answer feedback, correct/wrong count, and chapter mastery percentage. 
 Student Progress Tracking:-The platform stores score history, attempted 
quizzes, performance trends, and overall progress. 
 AdminPanel(Optional):-Admins can upload, modify, or delete questions and 
review student performance logs. 
 Tablet-Friendly UserInterface:-The system supports “Add to Home Screen” 
functionality, enabling app-like usage, full-screen mode, and distraction-free 
learning—ideal for school tablets. 
 Secure Scalable Web Deployment:-The project includes hosting setup, SSL 
integration, and responsive design for smooth use across devices. 
3. 2 Exclusions 
 Offline standalone mobile applications (Android/iOS). 
 Non-NCERT syllabus such as CBSE reference books, state boards, or 
competitive exam books. 
 Video lectures, animations, or live teaching modules. 
 Advanced AI models for long-form descriptive answer checking. 
 Integration with school ERP or attendance systems. 
 
4. EXISTING  
The existing system for NCERT-based question practice is largely traditional 
and lacks automation, personalization, and structured digital accessibility. 
Students typically rely on physical textbooks, handwritten notes, and manual 
question banks to revise chapter-wise concepts. This method is time-consuming 
and does not provide instant evaluation or performance tracking. There are 
some online educational platforms available, but they also come with 
limitations: 
1. Manual NCERT Practice 
 Students refer to books or PDFs for questions. 
 Answers must be checked manually. 
 No analytics or chapter mastery indicators. 
2. Online Quiz Websites 
 Provide general quizzes but not NCERT-specific content. 7 
  Questions are manually added and not generated dynamically. 
 Lack class-wise and chapter-wise navigation. 
3. Educational Apps 
 Many apps offer NCERT solutions,  
 They are mostly paid or subscription-based. 
 They do not offer AI-generated questions. 
 They lack structured difficulty levels (Easy/Medium/Hard). 
 Instant feedback and personalized progress tracking are limited. 
4. School-Based Digital Learning 
 Some schools use tablets or smart classes,  
 Resources are not interactive. 
 No AI-powered adaptive practice. 
 No centralized question practice system. 
 
5. PROPOSED METHODOLOGY 
 The proposed methodology for AI based question bank prediction system 
based on Ncert curriculum  focuses on building an AI-enabled, web-based 
NCERT learning platform that allows students to practice chapter-wise 
questions with instant evaluation and progress tracking. The methodology is 
divided into systematic phases that ensure smooth development, AI 
integration, and effective learning outcomes. 
System Flow 
 Home Page → Class Selection 
 Subjects → Chapter List 
 AI Model → Reads NCERT chapter 
 Generates questions automatically 
 Student answers → System evaluates 
 Generates result + mastery percentage 
Backend Logic 
AI Model Performs: 
 Text extraction from NCERT PDFs 8 
  Auto-generation of question types 
 Difficulty categorization 
 Answer matching & scoring 
Database Stores: 
 Student details Question sets 
 Scores & progress logs 
 Mastery percentages 
Implementation Plan 
  UI design & structure 
  Backend & AI setup 
  Question generation module 
  Testing & validation 
  Deployment + tablet integration 
 
6. EXPECTED OUTCOME 
The development of AI based question bank prediction system based on Ncert 
curriculum  is expected to produce an intelligent, user-friendly, and efficient 
learning system that enhances NCERT-based practice for students. The 
anticipated outcomes of the project are as follows: 
1.AI-Generated NCERT Question Bank 
The system will automatically generate chapter-wise questions including: 
 Multiple Choice Questions (MCQs)True/False 
 Short answer questions 
 Difficulty levels (Easy / Medium / Hard) 
2. Automated Evaluation System Students will receive: 
This ensures relevant, updated, and concept-based practice. 
 Instant scoring 
 Correct/wrong feedback 
 Accuracy percentage 
 Chapter mastery percentage 
3. Personalized Learning Experience The platform will provide: This promotes 
fast learning and accurate self-assessment. 9 
  Progress tracking 
 Attempt history 
 Weak/strong chapter identification 
 Adaptive difficulty practice 
4. Interactive and Structured Learning Interface 
This helps students improve performance gradually. 
 Class-wise and subject-wise organized navigation 
 Clean and child-friendly UI 
 One-question-per-screen quiz format 
 Chapter progress indicators 
5. Tablet-Friendly App-Like System 
By using the “Add to Home Screen” feature, the system will: 
 Work like a mobile/tablet app 
 Run in full-screen mode 
 Provide a distraction-free environment 
 Be ideal for school tablet setups 
6. Admin Panel for Content Management 
Optional admin features will allow: 
 Addition, modification, and deletion of questions 
 Monitoring of student activity and performance 
 Database updates and chapter management 
7. Secure, Scalable, and Deployable Web System 
The final product will: 
 Be fully hosted on a secure domain 
 Support SSL-based HTTPS access 
 Handle multiple users simultaneously 
 Be accessible on laptops, mobiles, and tablets 
 
 
 
7. TOOLS AND TECHNOLOGIES USED 10 
 Frontend:  
HTML, CSS, JavaScript 
Backend:  
Node.js / Express.js 
Database:  
Firebase / MySQL 
AI Technologies:  
NLP-based model 
Text extraction (OCR/PDF Reader) 
Question generation algorithms 
Others: 
Git, VS Code 
Web hosting + SSL 
Add to Home Screen (PWA behavior) 
 
8.CONCLUSION   
The development of AI based question bank prediction system based on Ncert 
curriculum demonstrates how artificial intelligence can significantly enhance 
the learning experience for students studying NCERT-based subjects. The 
platform provides a structured, interactive, and efficient method for practicing 
chapter-wise questions for Classes 6 to 8. By integrating AI-driven question 
generation, instant evaluation, and progress tracking, the system addresses the 
limitations of traditional learning methods and existing educational platforms. 
AI based question bank prediction system based on Ncert curriculum  not only 
simplifies access to NCERT practice material but also personalizes the learning 
process by offering chapter mastery analysis, difficulty-level quizzes, and 
performance monitoring. The clean, user-friendly interface and tablet-optimized 
design ensure that students can use the system easily at home or in school 
digital classrooms. The “Add to Home Screen” feature further transforms the 
web platform into an app-like environment, supporting distraction-free learning. 
This project highlights the potential of technology and AI in improving 
educational outcomes by making practice more engaging, adaptive, and 
accessible. With continuous enhancements and scalability, AI based question 
bank prediction system based on Ncert curriculum can evolve into a 
comprehensive learning ecosystem that supports students, teachers, and schools 
in achieving better academic performance. 11
